hub_subtitle: Conversação para Feiras Internacionais de Turismo & Hotelaria

lesson.menu_title: The Art of Small Talk -- Conversations at the Fair
lesson.menu_desc: Starting and sustaining conversations at international fairs -- 32 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 3 -- The Art of Small Talk
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Andrea Aggio | Aula 3 -- The Art of Small Talk

listenings.text: Hi Andrea, it is Daniel from Lisbon. It was really nice to meet you at our booth this morning. I enjoyed our chat, and I think we have a lot of common ground. I have just checked the program, and the keynote speaker starts at four o'clock, so we still have time for a coffee before that. I would love to hear more about your itineraries and tell you about my hotel group. If you are free, come by the booth again this afternoon, and we can keep the conversation going. Talk soon, and enjoy the rest of the fair.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to day two of the International Tourism Fair. We have a wonderful program for you today. In fifteen minutes, our first panel session begins in Hall B, where four industry leaders will discuss the future of sustainable travel. Please remember to wear your badge at all times, as our exhibitors are happy to welcome delegates at every booth. The networking lounge on the second floor is now open, so it is the perfect place to break the ice and meet new partners. Our keynote speaker takes the main stage at four o'clock. We wish you a productive and friendly day.
